## Defects

### DEF-SEC-001 — Auth Header Token Format (High)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Source Track** | security |
| **Test ID** | SEC-008 |
| **OWASP** | A07 — Identification and Authentication Failures |
| **Severity** | High |
| **File** | `frontend/src/api-service/cart.service.jsx` |
| **Description** | `authHeader()` constructs `Authorization: ${user?.type}${user?.token}` without space between scheme and token value — non-standard format. If backend expects `Bearer <token>`, this sends `Bearer<token>`. |
| **Remediation** | Verify backend accepts this format. If standard Bearer is expected, add space: `${user?.type} ${user?.token}` |
| **Introduced by Fix?** | No — pre-existing pattern |

---

### DEF-SEC-002 — Auth Token in localStorage (Medium)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Source Track** | security |
| **Test ID** | SEC-002 |
| **OWASP** | A02 — Cryptographic Failures |
| **Severity** | Medium |
| **File** | `frontend/src/api-service/cart.service.jsx` |
| **Description** | Auth token stored as plaintext in localStorage. Accessible to any JS on the same origin. XSS could steal tokens. |
| **Remediation** | Migrate to httpOnly cookies or Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) pattern |
| **Introduced by Fix?** | No — pre-existing pattern |

---

### DEF-SEC-003 — Cart Quantity No Server-Side Bounds (Medium)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Source Track** | security |
| **Test ID** | SEC-006 |
| **OWASP** | A04 — Insecure Design |
| **Severity** | Medium |
| **File** | `frontend/src/components/cart/cart.jsx` (UI-only enforcement) |
| **Description** | Cart quantity bounds (1–20) enforced only via UI CSS classes. No server-side validation evidence. Crafted API requests could bypass limits. |
| **Remediation** | Add backend quantity validation in cart-service |
| **Introduced by Fix?** | No — pre-existing |

---

### DEF-SEC-004 — MongoDB Unauthenticated Connection (Medium)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Source Track** | security |
| **Test ID** | SEC-007 |
| **OWASP** | A05 — Security Misconfiguration |
| **Severity** | Medium |
| **File** | `microservice-backend/user-service/src/main/resources/application.yml` |
| **Description** | MongoDB connection URI uses no authentication. Acceptable for local development per ADR-001, but production must use authenticated connections. |
| **Remediation** | Use Spring profiles or env vars for production MongoDB credentials |
| **Introduced by Fix?** | No — pre-existing pattern (URI value changed but auth model unchanged) |

---

### DEF-SEC-005 — Cart Errors Silently Swallowed (Medium → Low)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Source Track** | security |
| **Test ID** | SEC-009 |
| **OWASP** | A09 — Security Logging and Monitoring Failures |
| **Severity** | Low |
| **File** | `frontend/src/api-service/cart.service.jsx` |
| **Description** | Cart API errors set a boolean flag (`setError(true)`) without logging error details. Auth failures are invisible in client telemetry. |
| **Remediation** | Add structured error logging for API failures |
| **Introduced by Fix?** | No — pre-existing |

---

### DEF-CMP-001 — localStorage Token (Data Protection) (Low)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Source Track** | compliance |
| **Test ID** | CMP-014 |
| **Framework** | Data Protection |
| **Severity** | Low |
| **Description** | Duplicate of DEF-SEC-002 from data protection perspective. Auth token in localStorage accessible to any JS on same origin. |
| **Remediation** | Migrate to httpOnly cookies |
| **Introduced by Fix?** | No — pre-existing |

---

### DEF-CMP-002 — Generic Image Alt Text (Low)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Source Track** | compliance |
| **Test ID** | CMP-021 |
| **Framework** | Accessibility |
| **Severity** | Low |
| **File** | `frontend/src/pages/products/products.jsx` |
| **Description** | Products page uses generic `alt='product'` instead of `alt={product.productName}`. Pre-existing pattern, not introduced by fix. |
| **Remediation** | Change to `alt={product.productName}` for better screen reader support |
| **Introduced by Fix?** | No — pre-existing |
